result.markdown:
--- title: "HW 4: Data Visualization" subtitle: "Stat 198, Spring 2026" fontsize: 12pt urlcolor: blue output: html --- ## Screen Time's Barchart Replication The following table contains the data of the barchart (units: minutes). | Days | Social | Entertainment | Creativity | Other | |:----------|:-------|:--------------|:-----------|:------| | Sunday | 107 | 29 | 1 | 101 | | Monday | 100 | 22 | 3 | 22 | | Tuesday | 46 | 32 | 8 | 69 | | Wednesday | 88 | 14 | 1 | 44 | | Thursday | 117 | 0 | 1 | 72 | | Friday | 69 | 1 | 1 | 39 | | Saturday | 98 | 0 | 9 | 46 |
::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # 1) Here's one way to obtain the input data table # input vectors days = c("Sunday", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday") social = c(107, 100, 46, 88, 117, 69, 98) entertainment = c(29, 22, 32, 14, 0, 1, 0) creativity = c(1, 3, 8, 1, 1, 1, 9) other = c(101, 22, 69, 44, 72, 39, 46) # assemble data frame tbl <- data.frame( 'Day' = days, 'Social' = social, 'Entertainment' = entertainment, 'Creativity' = creativity, 'Other' = other ) # reshape into long (tall) format for ggplot convenience tbl <- pivot_longer( data = tbl, # table to be reshaped cols = Social:Other, # variables to be "stacked" together names_to = "Category", # column-name of stacked variables values_to = "Time") # column-name of stacked values # convert time from minutes to hours tbl <- mutate(tbl, Time = Time / 60) head(tbl) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` # A tibble: 6 × 3 Day Category Time 1 Sunday Social 1.78 2 Sunday Entertainment 0.483 3 Sunday Creativity 0.0167 4 Sunday Other 1.68 5 Monday Social 1.67 6 Monday Entertainment 0.367 ``` ::: :::
::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # another way to create a data tabe in "long" (tall) format # for ggplot() convenience Day <- rep(x = c("Sunday", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday"), each = 4) Category <- rep(x = c("Social", "Entertainment", "Creativity", "Other"), times = 7) Time <- c(107, 29, 1, 101, 100, 22, 3, 22, 46, 32, 8, 69, 88, 14, 1, 44, 117, 0, 1, 72, 69, 1, 1, 39, 98, 0, 9, 46) / 60 tbl <- data.frame(Day, Category, Time) ``` :::
::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # 2) Total time per day # (to be used later to get average time) dat_total_time = tbl %>% group_by(Day) %>% summarise(total_time = sum(Time)) %>% ungroup() dat_total_time ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` # A tibble: 7 × 2 Day total_time 1 Friday 1.83 2 Monday 2.45 3 Saturday 2.55 4 Sunday 3.97 5 Thursday 3.17 6 Tuesday 2.58 7 Wednesday 2.45 ``` ::: :::
::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} # 3) Barchart # (code based on Angel Alcala's submission) # color palette orange1 = "#E59400" light_gray1 = "#939393" gray1 = "#4C4C4C" blue1 = "#2D89E5" light_blue1 = "#96C4F2" green1 = "#00B300" # barchart ggplot( data = tbl, aes(x = Day, y = Time, fill = factor(Category, levels = c("Other", "Creativity", "Entertainment","Social")))) + geom_bar(width = 0.6, position = "stack", stat = "identity") + # customizing scale elements scale_x_discrete(limits = days, labels = c("S", "M", "T", "W", "T", "F", "S")) + scale_y_continuous(labels = c("0", " ", " ", " ", "4h"), position = "right") + geom_hline(yintercept = mean(dat_total_time$total_time), color = green1, linetype = "dashed") + scale_fill_manual(values = c(gray1, orange1, light_blue1, blue1)) + # theme elements theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black"), panel.grid.major = element_line(color = gray1), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linetype = "dashed"), axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15), plot.background = element_rect(fill = "black"), legend.position = "none", plot.margin = unit(c(2.4,.7,2.4,.4), "cm"), axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank()) + # annotations annotate("text", x = 1.3, y = 5.25, label = "Daily Average", size = 5.5, color = light_gray1) + annotate("text", x = 1.3, y = 4.6, label = "2h 38m", size = 10.5, color = "white") + annotate("text", x = 6.7, y = 4.5, label = "28% from last week", size = 5.5, color = light_gray1) + annotate("text", x = 7.85, y = 2.75, label = "avg", size = 5, color = green1) + annotate("text", x = .96, y = -1.2, label = "Social", size = 6, color = blue1) + annotate("text", x = 4, y = -1.2, label = "Entertainment", size = 6, color = light_blue1) + annotate("text", x = 7.25, y = -1.2, label = "Creativity", size = 6, color = orange1) + annotate("text", x = .96, y = -1.7, label = "10h 21m", size = 6, color = "white") + annotate("text", x = 4, y = -1.7, label = "1h 10m", size = 6, color = "white") + annotate("text", x = 7.25, y = -1.7, label = "24m", size = 6, color = "white") + coord_cartesian(xlim = c(1,7), ylim = c(0,4), clip = "off") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](solns-hw4_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672} ::: :::
